content:
After many, many hours curating for Punk6529, it is nice to share some of the artwork collection highlights. Watch Genesis highlights (3 mins 25s).

It wasn't immediately obvious to MintFace that many of generative artworks were animated. For example, the Century collection can get 'recut', the Chromie Squiggles burst a rainbow of colour and The Blocks of Art are miniature cubes of goodness.

Lots to take in. Go and look for yourself at Genesis Museum.
